VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: RSI
Focus: Medical

The legendary Apollo Triage from Roberts Space Industries is the gold standard in medevac and rapid emergency response vehicles. Updated to support regeneration technology, the Apollo has a long history providing critical aid to the Empire and beyond for well over two centuries.
